name: 5L Stacking Clear Bin with Lid - Brightroom™: PET, Stackable, Universal Storage, Handles, 13.77" x 5.11"
description:
Neatly keep small essentials in one place with the help of this Stacking Clear Bin with Lid from Brightroom™. Designed in a cubical silhouette, this bin offers space for storing small everyday household items, helping you keep your space organized, while the transparent clear design lets you view the contents from the outside. Cutout handles on each side make it easy to lift and carry, and the indexed lid not only helps keep the contents secure, but also allows different storage bins to be neatly stacked on top of each other for space-saving storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
